qa_pairs.question: When did the new Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies regarding storage quotas come into effect?
qa_pairs.answer: New Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies, which allow larger quotas for project and nearline spaces, came into effect on April 1, 2024.

qa_pairs.question: How can users obtain quota increases that are beyond what the new Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies permit?
qa_pairs.answer: Quota changes larger than those permitted by the Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies will require an application to the annual Resource Allocation Competition.
